pr.title: [docs] Add troubleshooting for context summarizer fabricating user consent (#61721)
pr.body:
## Summary

Adds a troubleshooting entry for the context summarizer fabricating user consent actions (e.g. 'User approved the plan via ExitPlanMode') when none occurred. The summarizer overrides explicit user instructions and invents actions, causing the model to execute code changes without authorization.

Closes #61721
pr.author: giruuuuj
